subject: [PATCH v2] btrfs: fix potential segfault in balance_remap_chunks()

reviews.author: Mark Harmstone
reviews.summary: Posted the original patch with a clear description of the problem and the solution.

2026-03-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a potential segfault in the balance_remap_chunks() function by checking if the block group pointer is NULL before dereferencing it.

reviews.author: Johannes Thumshirn
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with a Reviewed-by tag, indicating that it looks good to them.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch fixes a potential segfault in the balance_remap_chunks() function by checking if a block group is used before marking it as unused.

reviews.author: David Sterba
reviews.summary: Changed the subject line to better reflect the patch's changes and suggested a more accurate description of the fix.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: The patch fixes a potential segfault in the balance_remap_chunks() function by checking if a block group is used before marking it as unused.
